title: Unbreakable Items
description: A Minecraft mod that disables item breaking. Tools and armor reach 0 durability, then lock until they're repaired, preserving enchanted gear.
body:
When an item breaks, instead of disappearing, it is left at 0 durability and is unusable until it is repaired. Works on all items with durability.

This is a server-side mod. That means players do not need to install this mod; only the server owner does. However, for singleplayer, you need to install the mod.
